summary: Comprehensive pre-deployment testing completed for AurborBloom HRMS. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features verified working including Authentication, Employee Invitation System, Time Tracking, Ticketing (Kanban), Leave Management, Calendar, Projects, and Profile.
critical_code_review_comments: All authentication flows working correctly with specific error messages
Employee invitation system fully functional with INV-XXXXXX code format
Kanban board for tickets displays correctly with 4 columns
Leave management shows proper status badges (APPROVED, PENDING, DENIED)
Calendar displays holidays and leaves with color coding
Projects page shows project cards with status and member counts
Time tracking has Clock In/Out, Break Timer, and Export PDF functionality
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed items created during testing (tickets, projects, leave requests, invitations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive pre-deployment testing completed. All major HRMS features verified working.

admin_login.details: Admin login with admin@company.com works correctly

wrong_email_error.details: Shows 'No account found with this email address'

employee_signup_blocked.details: Employee signup without invitation code returns 403

export_pdf.details: Export PDF button visible on dashboard

create_ticket.details: Employee can create ticket with category and priority

view_own_tickets.details: Employee sees own tickets in Kanban view

admin_view_tickets.details: Admin sees all tickets with stats

update_status.details: Ticket status can be updated via API

add_comments.details: Comments can be added to tickets

kanban_board.details: 4 columns: Open, In Progress, Waiting on User, Resolved

admin_view_requests.details: Admin can view all leave requests

add_holiday.details: Admin can add holiday via API

filter_events.details: Filter options for Holidays, Leaves, Project Deadlines, etc.

assign_employees.details: Admin can assign employees to project

project_cards.details: Shows status, hours, and member count
